title: Auto-generate BL Quality Report
description: We manually check each business listing for quality issues like missing images, incomplete specs, and poor descriptions. An automated skill could flag these and suggest improvements.

title: Translate Seller Listings to Hindi
description: Many sellers have English-only listings but serve Hindi-speaking buyers. A skill that auto-translates listing content to Hindi would increase reach significantly.

title: Summarise Buyer Query Threads
description: Buyer query threads can be very long. A skill that summarises the key ask, sentiment, and recommended action would help our team respond faster.
